'''zhafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanwhile|meanwhile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanwhile|meanwhile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafate|zhafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafatesher|zhafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafatesherĂ«m|zhafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafatero|zhafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafateshĂ«|zhafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafateshĂ«m|zhafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafatero|gokizhafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafateshĂ«|gokizhafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafateshĂ«m|gokizhafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafankerom|gozhafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafankeshĂ«|gozhafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafankeshĂ«m|gozhafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafankeya|gozhafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafaterom|zhafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafatemu|zhafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafateya|zhafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafaterom|gokizhafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafatemu|gokizhafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafateya|gokizhafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafafate|zhafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafafatesher|zhafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafafatesherĂ«m|zhafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafafatero|zhafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafafateshĂ«|zhafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafafateshĂ«m|zhafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafafatero|gokizhafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafafateshĂ«|gokizhafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafafateshĂ«m|gokizhafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafafankerom|gozhafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafafankeshĂ«|gozhafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafafankeshĂ«m|gozhafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafafankeya|gozhafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafafaterom|zhafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafafatemu|zhafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafafateya|zhafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafafaterom|gokizhafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafafatemu|gokizhafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafafateya|gokizhafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠte|zhĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠtesher|zhĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠtero|zhĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠterom|zhĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠtemu|zhĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠfĂŠteya|zhĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠfĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafafte|zhafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafaftesher|zhafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafaftesherĂ«m|zhafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafaftero|zhafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafafteshĂ«|zhafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafafteshĂ«m|zhafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafaftero|gokizhafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafafteshĂ«|gokizhafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafafteshĂ«m|gokizhafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafafnkerom|gozhafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafafnkeshĂ«|gozhafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafafnkeya|gozhafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafafterom|zhafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafaftemu|zhafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafafteya|zhafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafafterom|gokizhafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafaftemu|gokizhafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafafteya|gokizhafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
